personal.name: Andrius Plienius
personal.headline: AI & Machine Learning Engineer | Problem Solver | Python Backend Developer | Building Data-Driven Solutions

summary: I am a Problem Solver who uses AI, Machine Learning, and Python as my primary tools. My goal is simple: to find the most efficient way to solve a client's pain point and bridge the gap between business needs and complex technical implementations.With a solid foundation in Information Technology (BSc from KTU) and 3 years of professional Python development experience (Django, API integrations), I have pivoted toward AI Engineering. My unique strength lies in a blend of deep 'soft skills' from over a decade in sales and the technical 'hard skills' required to build scalable AI solutions.My Technical Focus & Expertise:AI Engineering & LLMs: Designing and implementing AI agents, RAG systems, and complex workflows using LangGraph, LangChain, and OpenAI.Data Science & Analysis: Expert use of Python (Pandas, NumPy) for Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA) and Feature Engineering to ensure model accuracy.MLOps & Deployment: Experience in containerizing applications with Docker and deploying ML models (LightGBM, XGBoost) via FastAPI on Google Cloud Platform (GCP).Backend Development: Writing clean, scalable code with experience in Django, Odoo integrations, and automation scripts.

achievements: Built a 'middleman' system to register all 3CX telephony system calls directly into Odoo ERP, centralizing client interaction history.
Successfully launched a production-ready system that digitized the service cycle, eliminating manual scheduling errors and ensuring all jobs were assigned within a 24-hour window.

experience.description: Collaborated with a developer community focused on building web applications. Specialized in Back-End development, utilizing Django REST Framework for API logic and SQLite for database management.
Combined technical expertise with proactive sales strategies, ensuring that complex telecommunications solutions reached the end customer.
